paragraphs.title: DividendS
paragraphs.text:
// MATCH and COLLECT the map of terms.

UNWIND range(8,8) AS n                       
WITH toString(n) AS N, '30' as nMax,'32' as dimension,32 as rowCounter      
MATCH (v:VertexNode)<-[vI:VertexIndexedBy]-(i:IndexedBy {N:N,MaxN:nMax,Dimension:dimension,RowCounter:rowCounter})-[]->(e:Evaluate) 
WITH {TermList:Collect({Scalar:apoc.number.exact.div(v.Scalar,vI.divisor),Degree:v.Degree,Divisor:vI.divisor})} AS tLDividend,dimension,i
WITH tLDividend.TermList as tLtL,tLDividend,dimension,i

//  List comprehend and concatinate with above a map  a list of zero terms whenever range not in degree

UNWIND tLtL as tLtLU
WITH COLLECT(tLtLU.Degree) as degreeList,tLDividend,i
WITH [x IN range(0,16) WHERE NOT (toString(x) IN degreeList) | {Scalar:'0',Degree:toString(x),Divisor:'1'} ] AS zeroScalar,tLDividend,i
WITH zeroScalar+tLDividend.TermList AS theDividend,i

// Sort the map rows and collect individual term fields. 

UNWIND theDividend as tDividendU
WITH {Scalar:tDividendU.Scalar,Degree:tDividendU.Degree,Divisor:tDividendU.Divisor} AS tDiv,i ORDER BY toInteger(tDividendU.Degree) DESC
WITH COLLECT(tDiv.Scalar) AS tSca,COLLECT(tDiv.Degree) AS tDeg,COLLECT(tDiv.Divisor) AS tDiv,i

// Construct List for determining index of highest term.

WITH tSca,tDeg,tDiv,SIZE(tSca) AS tDivSize,i
WITH [x IN range(0,16) WHERE NOT (tSca[x]='0' ) | x ] AS sIndexList,tDiv,tSca,tDeg,tDivSize,i
//Return sIndexList

// Determin index of highest term.

UNWIND sIndexList as sIU
WITH min(sIU) as indxHghstTerm,tDiv,tSca,tDeg,tDivSize,i
//RETURN gDivisor,tDiv

// Write p, p meta data to node.

CREATE (c:NextDividend {Scalar:tSca,Degree:tDeg,Divisor:tDiv,ScalarO:tSca,DegreeO:tDeg,DivisorO:tDiv,ScalarSize:tDivSize, ScalarOSize:tDivSize,IndxHghstTerm:indxHghstTerm})
MERGE (i) -[:PDivide]->(c)
RETURN id(c)

paragraphs.title: DivisorS
paragraphs.text:
UNWIND range(5,5) AS n                       
WITH toString(n) AS N, '30' as nMax,'16' as dimension, 2475297 as idD      //32 as rowCounter,   
MATCH (v:VertexNode)<-[vI:VertexIndexedBy]-(i:IndexedByArgument {N:N,MaxN:nMax,Dimension:dimension})-[]->(e:Evaluate) 
WITH {TermList:Collect({Scalar:apoc.number.exact.div(v.Scalar,vI.divisor),Degree:v.Degree,Divisor:vI.divisor})} AS tLDividend,dimension,i,idD
WITH tLDividend.TermList as tLtL,tLDividend,dimension,idD

//  List comprehend and concatinate with above a map  a list of zero terms whenever range not in degree

UNWIND tLtL as tLtLU
WITH COLLECT(tLtLU.Degree) as degreeList,tLDividend,idD
WITH [x IN range(0,16) WHERE NOT (toString(x) IN degreeList) | {Scalar:'0',Degree:toString(x),Divisor:'1'} ] AS zeroScalar,tLDividend,idD
WITH zeroScalar+tLDividend.TermList AS theDividend,idD

// Sort the map rows and collect individual term fields. 

UNWIND theDividend as tDividendU
WITH {Scalar:tDividendU.Scalar,Degree:tDividendU.Degree,Divisor:tDividendU.Divisor} AS tDiv,idD ORDER BY toInteger(tDividendU.Degree) DESC
WITH COLLECT(tDiv.Scalar) AS tSca,COLLECT(tDiv.Degree) AS tDeg,COLLECT(tDiv.Divisor) AS tDiv,idD  

// Construct List for determining index of highest term.

WITH tSca,tDeg,tDiv,SIZE(tSca) AS tDivSize,idD
WITH [x IN range(0,16) WHERE NOT (tSca[x]='0' ) | x ] AS sIndexList,tDiv,tSca,tDeg,tDivSize,idD,COLLECT('0') AS rDegree, COLLECT('1') AS rScalar
//Return sIndexList

// Determin index of highest term.

UNWIND sIndexList as sIU
WITH min(sIU) as indxHghstTerm,tDiv,tSca,tDeg,tDivSize,idD, rScalar,rDegree      //, COLLECT('0') AS rDegree, COLLECT('1') AS rDivisor
//RETURN indxHghstTerm,tDiv,tSca,tDeg,tDivSize,idD,rScalar,rDegree,rDivisor

// Write p, p meta data to node.

MATCH (d:NextDividend) WHERE id(d)=idD
CREATE (c:NextDivisor {Scalar:tSca,Degree:tDeg,Divisor:tDiv,ScalarSize:tDivSize,IndxHghstTerm:indxHghstTerm,RScalar: rScalar,RDegree:rDegree })
MERGE (d) -[:PDivide]->(c)
RETURN id(c)

paragraphs.title: DivisionS' Match by ID()
paragraphs.text:
MATCH (nDividend:NextDividend) - [:PDivide] -> (nDivisor:NextDivisor) WHERE ID(nDividend)=2475238 AND ID(nDivisor)=2475236 
WITH nDividend.Scalar AS scalar,nDividend.Degree AS degree,nDividend.Divisor AS divisor,nDividend.ScalarO AS scalarO,nDividend.DegreeO AS degreeO,nDividend.DivisorO AS divisorO,
     nDividend.ScalarOSize AS scalarOSize ,nDividend.ScalarSize AS scalarSize ,nDividend.IndxHghstTerm AS indxHghstTerm, 
     nDivisor.Scalar AS scalarN, nDivisor.Degree AS degreeN, nDivisor.Divisor AS divisorN, nDivisor.ScalarSize AS scalarSizeN, nDivisor.IndxHghstTerm AS indxHghstTermN,nDivisor,nDividend as nD

WITH scalar,degree,divisor,scalarO,degreeO,divisorO,
     scalarOSize,scalarSize,indxHghstTerm, 
     scalarN,degreeN,divisorN,scalarSizeN,indxHghstTermN,nDivisor,nD

MATCH (nDividend:NextDividend),(nDivisor:NextDivisor) WHERE ID(nDividend)=2475238 AND ID(nDivisor)=2475236 
WITH nDividend.Scalar AS scalar,nDividend.Degree AS degree,nDividend.Divisor AS divisor,nDividend.ScalarO AS scalarO,nDividend.DegreeO AS degreeO,nDividend.DivisorO AS divisorO,
     nDividend.ScalarOSize AS scalarOSize ,nDividend.ScalarSize AS scalarSize ,nDividend.IndxHghstTerm AS indxHghstTerm, 
     nDivisor.Scalar AS scalarN, nDivisor.Degree AS degreeN, nDivisor.Divisor AS divisorN, nDivisor.ScalarSize AS scalarSizeN, nDivisor.IndxHghstTerm AS indxHghstTermN,nDivisor,nDividend as nD

RETURN scalar,degree,divisor,scalarO,degreeO,divisorO,
     scalarOSize,scalarSize,indxHghstTerm, 
     scalarN,degreeN,divisorN,scalarSizeN,indxHghstTermN,nDivisor,nD

MATCH   p=()<-[]-(nDividend:NextDividend) - [:PDivide] -> (nDivisor:NextDivisor) WHERE ID(nDividend)=2475236
UNWIND NODES(p) AS pU
return pU

paragraphs.title: Delete NDN
paragraphs.text:
UNWIND range(10,10) AS n                       
WITH toString(n) AS N, '30' as nMax,'32' as dimension,32 as rowCounter      
//MATCH (i:IndexedBy {N:N,MaxN:nMax,Dimension:dimension,RowCounter:rowCounter})-[:PDivide]->(c:NextDividendNode)
MATCH (c:NextDividendNode)
DETACH DELETE c
RETURN COUNT(c)

paragraphs.title: DivisionS OLD
paragraphs.text:
MATCH (nDividend:NextDividend) - [:PDivide] -> (nDivisor:NextDivisor) WHERE ID(nDividend)=2475236 AND ID(nDivisor)=2475237 
WITH nDividend.Scalar AS scalar,nDividend.Degree AS degree,nDividend.Divisor AS divisor,nDividend.ScalarO AS scalarO,nDividend.DegreeO AS degreeO,nDividend.DivisorO AS divisorO,
     nDividend.ScalarOSize AS scalarOSize ,nDividend.ScalarSize AS scalarSize ,nDividend.IndxHghstTerm AS indxHghstTerm, 
     nDivisor.Scalar AS scalarN, nDivisor.Degree AS degreeN, nDivisor.Divisor AS divisorN, nDivisor.ScalarSize AS scalarSizeN, nDivisor.IndxHghstTerm AS indxHghstTermN,nDivisor,nDividend as nD

WITH scalar,degree,divisor,scalarO,degreeO,divisorO,
     scalarOSize,scalarSize,indxHghstTerm, 
     scalarN,degreeN,divisorN,scalarSizeN,indxHghstTermN,nDivisor,nD

WITH apoc.number.exact.div(scalar[indxHghstTerm],scalarN[indxHghstTermN]) AS rScalar, apoc.number.exact.sub(degree[indxHghstTerm],degreeN[indxHghstTermN]) AS rDegree,scalar,degree,divisor,scalarO,degreeO,divisorO,
     scalarOSize,scalarSize,indxHghstTerm,scalarN,degreeN,divisorN,scalarSizeN,indxHghstTermN,nDivisor,nD    

WITH [x IN RANGE(0,scalarSizeN-1) | {Scalar:CASE WHEN scalarN[x]='0' THEN '0' ELSE apoc.number.exact.mul(scalarN[x],rScalar) END, Degree:CASE WHEN scalarN[x]='0' THEN degreeN[x] ELSE  apoc.number.exact.add(degreeN[x],rDegree) END ,Divisor:'1'} ] AS termsForSub,
     scalar,degree,divisor,scalarO,degreeO,divisorO,scalarOSize,scalarSize,indxHghstTerm,scalarN,degreeN,divisorN,scalarSizeN,indxHghstTermN,COLLECT(rScalar) AS rScalarC,COLLECT(rDegree) AS rDegreeC,nD,nDivisor 

SET nDivisor.RScalar = nDivisor.RScalar+rScalarC, nDivisor.RDegree=nDivisor.RDegree+rDegreeC

WITH [x IN RANGE(1,SIZE(termsForSub)-1) | {Scalar:apoc.number.exact.sub(scalar[x],termsForSub[x].Scalar),Degree:degree[x],Divisor:'1'}] as sbtractedTerms,scalar,degree,divisor,scalarO,degreeO,divisorO,
     scalarOSize,scalarSize,indxHghstTerm,scalarN,degreeN,divisorN,scalarSizeN,indxHghstTermN,nD 

WITH scalar,degree,divisor,scalarO,degreeO,divisorO,
     scalarOSize,scalarSize,indxHghstTerm,scalarN,degreeN,divisorN,scalarSizeN,indxHghstTermN,sbtractedTerms,indxHghstTerm+(scalarSizeN-indxHghstTermN) as nextTermIndex,nD   
                      
WITH {Scalar:scalarO[nextTermIndex + 1], Degree:degreeO[nextTermIndex + 1], Divisor:divisorO[nextTermIndex + 1]} AS nextTerm,sbtractedTerms,scalarO,degreeO,divisorO,scalarOSize, nextTermIndex+1>scalarOSize AS lastDivision,nD           
WITH sbtractedTerms + nextTerm as nextDividend,nextTerm,sbtractedTerms,scalarO,degreeO,divisorO,scalarOSize,lastDivision,nD

//RETURN nextDividend,SIZE(nextDividend),lastDivision,nD

UNWIND nextDividend AS nDU
//RETURN nDU.Scalar,nDU.Degree,nDU.Divisor
WITH COLLECT(nDU.Scalar) AS tSca,COLLECT(nDU.Degree) AS tDeg,COLLECT(nDU.Divisor) AS tDiv,scalarO,degreeO,divisorO,scalarOSize,lastDivision,nD

WITH tSca,tDeg,tDiv, SIZE(tSca) AS tDivSize,scalarO,degreeO,divisorO,scalarOSize,lastDivision,nD
WITH [x IN range(0,tDivSize-1) WHERE NOT (toFloat(tSca[x])=0.0) | x ] AS sIndexList,tDiv,tSca,tDeg,tDivSize,scalarO,degreeO,divisorO,scalarOSize,lastDivision,nD,COLLECT(tDivSize) as tDivSizeC
WITH sIndexList+tDivSizeC as sIndexList,tDiv,tSca,tDeg,tDivSize,scalarO,degreeO,divisorO,scalarOSize,lastDivision,nD

//RETURN SIZE(sIndexList)

UNWIND sIndexList as sIU
WITH  CASE WHEN SIZE(sIndexList)=0 THEN 0 ELSE min(sIU) END as indxHghstTerm,tDiv,tSca,tDeg,tDivSize,scalarO,degreeO,divisorO,scalarOSize,lastDivision,nD

//RETURN indxHghstTerm,tDiv,tSca,tDeg,tDivSize,scalarO,degreeO,divisorO,scalarOSize,lastDivision,nD

CREATE (c:NextDividend {Scalar:tSca,Degree:tDeg,Divisor:tDiv,ScalarO:tSca,DegreeO:tDeg,DivisorO:tDiv, ScalarSize:tDivSize, ScalarOSize:scalarOSize,IndxHghstTerm:indxHghstTerm})
MERGE (nD) -[:PDivide]->(c)
RETURN id(nD),id(c),lastDivision
